message:
refactor(tests): ArenaIndex→new_for_test migration, feature gates, real session protocol execution

API migration (8+ files):
- Replace RegionId::from_arena(ArenaIndex::new(n, g)) with
  RegionId::new_for_test(n, g) throughout
- Replace TaskId::from_arena(ArenaIndex::new(n, g)) with
  TaskId::new_for_test(n, g)
- Add helper functions task(), region(), task_number(),
  setup_runtime_state(), setup_task_table() to consolidate repeated
  patterns in cache_aware_queues.rs, join_cancel_bug_test.rs,
  scheduler_regression.rs, sharding_correctness.rs

Feature gates (12+ files):
- Add #[cfg(feature = "test-internals")] to test functions and imports
  that depend on internal testing infrastructure:
  io_cancellation.rs, runtime_e2e.rs, replay_debugging.rs,
  session_type_obligations.rs, repro_spawn_panic.rs,
  obligation_wasm_parity.rs, raptorq_conformance.rs,
  raptorq_perf_invariants.rs, lab_live_scenario_adapter_contract.rs,
  semantic_golden_fixture_validation.rs, obligation_lifecycle_e2e.rs

Substantive test improvements:
- io_cancellation.rs: Replace region.arena_index() with
  runtime.state.region() API for cleaner encapsulation
- session_type_obligations.rs: Replace disarm_for_test() stubs with
  actual protocol operations (send/recv/select/offer on session types)
  wrapped in async block_on with Cx::for_testing()
- scheduler_regression.rs: Add two new tests for preemption policy
  determinism
- stub_resolution_audit.rs: Add probe_18 and probe_19 stub audit tests

Style:
- Remove unused ArenaIndex imports
- Sort imports for consistency
- Minor formatting fixes

TESTING.md:
- Document new test-internals feature gate requirement for internal
  testing infrastructure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,6 +108,18 @@ Naming rules:
   `artifacts/<contract>_events.ndjson` unless they are already part of an
   existing suite root.
 
+The canonical stub-resolution runner (`scripts/verify_stub_resolution.sh`)
+additionally owns two stable suite-root discovery manifests under
+`target/e2e-results/stub-resolution/`:
+
+- `latest.json`: pointer to the newest attempted stub-resolution run
+- `latest_success.json`: pointer to the newest passing stub-resolution run
+
+Both manifests must remain machine-readable and must point at the per-run
+`summary.json`, `validation_stages.ndjson`, `scenarios.ndjson`, and scan summary
+so Z2/Z3 closeout can consume the current evidence bundle mechanically instead
+of scraping bead comments.
+
 ### RCH Execution Policy
 
 All cargo-heavy validation for Track-Z work must follow this policy:
